expectations.text: States that `code_graph.py` cannot see tables defined outside `$SPYGLASS_SRC`
expectations.evidence: Says 'Don't search the upstream Spyglass repo for it; by your own description the table isn't there, so any source-graph / repo-grep tool scoped to Spyglass will come up empty.'

expectations.text: Recommends runtime introspection through `db_graph.py` when available to the agent, or `MyLabRipplePostprocess.heading.primary_key` in the user's Python session; otherwise read the custom table's source definition directly
expectations.evidence: Path 1 recommends `MyLabRipplePostprocess.heading.primary_key`; Path 2 reads the lab package source definition; Path 3 queries the DB directly via `dj.FreeTable`. (Doesn't mention db_graph.py specifically since baseline lacks skill knowledge, but the user-Python and source paths are covered.)

expectations.text: Does NOT guess the PK from the class name or assume it inherits `RippleTimesV1`'s shape
expectations.evidence: Says 'Don't assume it's identical to RippleTimesV1.primary_key just because it wraps it' and 'do not assume the PK is identical to RippleTimesV1's PK.'

expectations.text: Treats this as a runtime-fact / custom-pipeline question, not a source-graph question
expectations.evidence: Recommends runtime `.heading.primary_key` first; explicitly says the fact 'is in your lab package and in the live DB, not in spyglass/.'
